candidates.why: Best available top-line revenue/sales style row; appears to aggregate rental/service/coworking income.
Major revenue component and may be the reported revenue label in some years.

variables.notes: No preferred REVT candidates were provided. Selected from the Income Statement preview; 'Income' looks like the main top-line, with 'Rental and service income' as fallback if labels changed across years.

candidates.why: Best match for direct property/service operating costs below revenue and above NOI.

variables.notes: No preferred COGS candidates were provided. 'Operating costs' appears to represent direct operating/property costs consistent with cost of sales, but this classification is industry-specific and should be reviewed.

candidates.why: Administrative labor is a clear SG&A component.
Residual central admin overhead excluding identified depreciation line.
Explicit SG&A label exists, though preview is empty.
Closest populated overhead bucket needed for years where explicit SG&A/components are missing in preview.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the populated overhead bucket 'Central administrative costs'. Per SG&A hierarchy, included explicit 'Selling/General/Admin Expense' plus the closest populated overhead bucket for coverage across years. Avoided adding labor/rest components together with the subtotal to prevent overlap/double counting. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Central administrative costs
No R&D line is identifiable in the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Most semantically correct reported interest expense line; preferable to lease-interest supplemental or other financial expenses.
Fallback net finance cost line if 'Interest costs' is unavailable in some years.
Candidate provided, but broader than pure interest expense and therefore lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest only; too narrow for total interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred candidate list missed the main interest-expense label. Selected 'Interest costs' as primary and 'Net interest items' as fallback. Manual review needed because 'Interest costs' appears more than once in the preview, creating duplicate-label ambiguity in the source sheet. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest costs, [Income Statement] Net interest items

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Usable only if parent-equity line were unavailable.
Not equity; balance sheet total, so not suitable.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity line is available and is the correct BE choice.

candidates.why: Equivalent alternative label present in the sheet.

variables.notes: Included both synonymous NCI labels as a priority list because labels may vary across years.
